description: Imaging studies for Resident Life simulator - indications, findings, turnaround times, and resource constraints

ct.name: CT Angiography Chest
ct.resourceConstraint: 1 CT scanner available. Queue: 0-2 patients ahead (15-30 min wait)
ct.limitations: Requires stable patient for transport. IV contrast needed. Check renal function.

ct.name: CT Head Non-Contrast
ct.resourceConstraint: Available. No wait if CT scanner free.
ct.limitations: Metal artifacts from dental work. Motion artifact if patient moves.

ultrasound.name: Bedside Echocardiogram
ultrasound.limitations: Operator dependent. Limited by body habitus, chest wall, lung interference.
ultrasound.peFindings: McConnell's sign (RV free wall akinesis with apical sparing), D-shaped LV, dilated RV, elevated PAP
ultrasound.tamponadeFindings: Pericardial effusion >2cm, diastolic RV collapse, IVC plethora
ultrasound.hfFindings: Reduced EF, regional wall motion abnormalities, dilated LV, valvular disease

ultrasound.name: FAST Exam (Trauma Ultrasound)
ultrasound.limitations: Cannot exclude retroperitoneal bleeding. Operator dependent.

ctScanner.busyMessage: CT Scanner occupied. Estimated wait: {minutes} minutes.

mri.notes: MRI not typically used in ED. For stable patients requiring detailed imaging.
